chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 513 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «لَوْ لاَ أَنَّ اَلصَّبْرَ خُلِقَ قَبْلَ اَلْبَلاَءِ لَتَفَطَّرَ اَلْمُؤْمِنُ كَمَا تَتَفَطَّرُ اَلْبَيْضَةُ عَلَى اَلصَّفَا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.513 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"If patience had not been created before trials, the believer would have shattered like an egg striking a rock."
